session.name: Continue from last frame — Phase 3 complete

goal.original: Implement the 'Continue from last frame' plan: right-click video → set as start/end frame → I2V generation, plus Extend/Combine via ffmpeg concat. 6 phases total.
goal.summary: Phases 1, 2, and 3 complete and verified live. Phase 3.0 hides PromptBox media strip in history workspace via root modifier; Phase 3.1 ships MpiToolOptionsPrompt organism (frame thumbs + swap + Extend/Create new) mounted in #right-top-slot for video-history when the active model supports any i2v op. Phase 4 (server ffmpeg concat) is next.

completed: 1.3 — History-workspace context gate (historyMode flag + Preview_Only=false + previewStage hidden)
2.1 — Right-click video viewer → MpiContextMenu with Set as start/end frame
2.2 — Frame-grab onClick: snapshot → upload → inject with role + auto-switch model
3.0 — Hide PromptBox media strip in history workspace (mpi-prompt-box--history-mode root modifier)
3.1 — MpiToolOptionsPrompt organism + mount in #right-top-slot (video + I2V-capable model gate)
pending: Phase 4 — Server ffmpeg concat route (/extend-video, /combine-videos) + sidecar fields
Phase 5 — Wire toolbar Extend/Create new + card context-menu items (Combine, Add to gallery)
Phase 6 — Numeric selection-order badges + 'Extended from' history row + docs/rules sync

next_action.description: Execute Phase 4.1 — extend ffprobeVideo with codec_name/pix_fmt/r_frame_rate, create services/videoConcat.js (concat-demuxer when codec match, filter fallback otherwise, spawn-based stderr progress parsing), create routes/videoConcat.js with POST /extend-video and POST /combine-videos, register in server.js, add js/services/concatProgress.js SSE bridge. Plan briefs first, waits for user 'go'.

key_decisions: Phase 3.0: hide media strip via root modifier class `mpi-prompt-box--history-mode` toggled in `updateContext` (diff-gated) plus init-time apply when props.context.historyMode === true. CSS rule: `.mpi-prompt-box--history-mode .mpi-prompt-box-media-strip { display: none; }`. Chips remain in `_mediaItems`; only rendering suppressed. Drop overlay + injectMedia keep working.

Phase 3.1: MpiToolOptionsPrompt is a new Organism (ComponentFactory.create). Props: { promptBox: <live MpiPromptBox instance>, project: { id, folderPath } }. Renders two role-tagged thumb slots (startFrame / endFrame), a center swap button, and two action buttons (Extend primary + Create new primary).

Toolbar mirrors PromptBox `_mediaItems` via `promptBox.on('media-change', _refreshFromPromptBox)`. Thumbs read via new public APIs `el.getMediaByRole(role)`, `el.removeMediaByRole(role)`, `el.swapMediaRoles(roleA, roleB)` added to MpiPromptBox.js. Swap mutates live `_mediaItems` role tags in place + calls `_emitMediaChange()` so chip strip (when visible elsewhere) and toolbar both reflect new roles.

Mount gate in MpiGroupHistoryBlock.mountOptions('prompt'): `isVideo && _modelHasI2V` where `_modelHasI2V = activeModel.supportedOps.some(op => op.startsWith('i2v'))`. NOT `_hasPromptOps()` — that requires imageCount>=1 which the toolbar itself is responsible for unlocking. Force-mounts PromptBox when video + I2V-capable so toolbar has a target even before any frame chip lands.

CSS visibility fix: `.mpi-group-history-block--prompt-active .mpi-group-history-block__right-top` no longer always hides; switched to `:empty` selector so video-history prompt mode reveals the slot only when MpiToolOptionsPrompt mounts a child. Image-history prompt mode keeps the slot empty → hidden.

Thumb sizing: no JS ratio calc. CSS-only — `min-height: 5rem; max-height: 10rem` on slot; img uses `max-width: 100%; max-height: 10rem; width: auto; height: auto; object-fit: contain;` so source ratio is preserved without props or measurements.

Extend / Create new buttons emit `Events.emit('prompt-box-tools:extend')` and `Events.emit('prompt-box-tools:create-new')` on the global Events bus. No Block-side listener yet — Phase 5.1 wires them to generationService (extend post-step calls /extend-video; create-new is a normal I2V submit). Both buttons render with `variant: 'primary'`.

Drop-on-thumb path uploads via shared `uploadMediaFile(file, 'image', project.folderPath, project.id, { filenamePrefix: 'frame-<role>', operation: 'frame-drop' })` then `promptBox.el.injectMedia({ url, mediaType: 'image', role })`. Same upload helper used by the right-click frame-grab path.
Swap icon added to icons.js as `swap` (two-arrow horizontal). Used in toolbar swap button via renderIcon('swap', 'sm').
preloadStyles.js registers the new CSS. types.js documents MpiToolOptionsPromptProps.
constraints: DO NOT gate toolbar mount on `_hasPromptOps()` — it requires imageCount>=1 and the toolbar is the place that unlocks i2v.
DO NOT use the old display:none rule on `.mpi-group-history-block--prompt-active .mpi-group-history-block__right-top` — current rule must stay `:empty`-scoped.
DO NOT inject thumbs with hardcoded aspect-ratio or measure dims in JS — img element handles ratio via object-fit: contain inside a height-capped slot.
DO NOT add new listeners on the Events bus for `prompt-box-tools:extend|create-new` outside of Phase 5.1 — keep the surface clean for the upcoming wiring.
Toolbar requires PromptBox instance to be mounted. Force-mount before MpiToolOptionsPrompt.mount in the prompt branch when isVideo && _modelHasI2V.

resume_prompt: You are picking up an in-flight implementation of the kanban entry 'Continue from last frame.' (in IMPLEMENTING). Phases 1, 2, and 3 of docs/plans/2026-05-12-continue-from-last-frame.md are done and verified live. Phase 4 (server ffmpeg concat) is next. Read docs/handoffs/2026-05-12-21-00-continue-from-last-frame.json for full context. Key prerequisites: extend services/ffprobeVideo.js to expose codec_name/pix_fmt/r_frame_rate; build services/videoConcat.js with concat-demuxer fast-path + concat-filter fallback (spawn for stderr progress); build routes/videoConcat.js with POST /extend-video + POST /combine-videos using the SSE channel pattern from routes/comfy.js; register in server.js; build a tiny js/services/concatProgress.js client bridge into StatusBar.progress.*. The toolbar in MpiToolOptionsPrompt already emits `prompt-box-tools:extend` and `prompt-box-tools:create-new` on the Events bus — those listeners ARE Phase 5.1, do not pre-wire them in Phase 4. Run /mpi-kanban:mpi-execute-next to brief and execute Phase 4.1. Honor the brief-before-code and verified-after gates.
